titleStmt.title: SII 41.217: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 217. (A.R. No. 435 of 1905.) Tiruttaṇi, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Viraṭṭānēśvara temple at Tiruttaṇi.

summary.p: This inscription refers to a remission of taxes made by the assembly of Tiruttaṇiyal in the 18th, Year of Aparājita-vikkirama-varmaṉ, on 1000 kuḻi of land situated to the north of the temple, purchased by Nambi Appi from the cultivators of the village and given to the dharmigaḷ of the village for providing offerings to and burning two twilight lamps in the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭānattudēva in the same village. The donoris evidentlythe builder of the temple mentioned in above inscription (A.R. 433 of 1905).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovicaiya Aparājitavikrama varmmakku yāṇṭu
patiṉeṭṭāvatu tiruttaṇiyal tiruviraṭṭāṉattu de
varkku nampiappiy Ivvūrk kuṭimakkaḷiṭai vilaikku
kkoṇṭa bhūmi vaṭapālaicceṟuvu Āyiraṅ kuḻiyā
lum vanta Iṟai mutal viṟṟu Ācantrākālattukkum śāśvatamāka
tiruttaṇiyal sabhaiyarkku Iṟaiiliyāvataṟkup poṉ kuṭu
ttuk koṇṭamaiyil sabhaiyomum Ivvāyiraṅ kuḻiyālu
m Epperppaṭṭa Iṟaiyum kāṭṭātomāṉom . Ibhūmi
devar bhogamākki Itaṉukku nicati nāṉāḻi Arici Iraṇ
ṭu tiruvamirtum Iraṇṭuc cantiviḷakkiṉukkum Uḻakke
ṇṇaiyum Ivvūr dharmmikaḷom sabhaiyār kaṭaikkāṭciyā
ka Ipparicu ceytukoṇṭuṭaiyomāṉom . Itucey
yomāyil Aṉṟāḷ kovukku nicati kāṟpoṉ taṇṭap
paṭuvomāṉom . Ittaṇṭampaṭṭum Ipparice ceyvomā
nom sabhaiyomum Ippaṭi Ārāyomāyil kaṅkaiiṭai ku
mariyiṭai ceytār ceyta pāvaṅ koḷvomāṉom . Allatu I
dharmmattiṉai Ira[kṣi*]kkiṉṟa tiruttaṇiyal sabhaiyārśrīpātam Eṉ
talai melanavākavum .
Digital edition of SII 41.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
